description.ko: 날카로운 기하학적 형태와 디지털의 불안정성이 충돌하는 KURO-X의 환상적인 표현입니다. 이 작품은 심연의 검은 배경을 바탕으로 파편화된 형상과 강렬한 글리치 효과를 통해 사이버네틱 진화의 본질을 담아냅니다.
description.en: A visionary representation of KURO-X where sharp geometric forms collide with digital instability. This piece captures the essence of cybernetic evolution through fragmented shapes and vibrant glitch effects against a deep black background.

prompt: KURO-X high-tech character design, geometric glitch aesthetic, fragmented polygons and floating sharp triangles, digital noise distortion, chromatic aberration, neon purple and electric blue accents on a matte black void, pixel sorting effects, glitch art style, cybernetic interface elements, high contrast, 8k resolution, sharp edges, cinematic lighting.
